milestones.title: Demo
milestones.description: Full demo flow: menu upload → Gloria → POS → kitchen printing

tasks.title: Liam menu agent — LLM-based category matching
Food photo sync — Google Drive → Shopify CDN
imageUrl column in Neon MenuItem table
Offline POS — all actions work with local-* orders
Pi MCP queue — Pi polls outbound every 3s
All 7 printers seeded in Neon DB
Kitchen ticket → all 5 kitchen printers confirmed
Customer bill + auth slip print routes
Receipt + auth slip buttons in PosModal
Phone-server mode (PhonePOS — voice-first, their tables only)
Guest count button creates local order immediately
Fire button on phone wired to kitchen printers

milestones.title: MVP
milestones.description: Full owner experience + AI features live at Red Bar

tasks.title: Item-triggered suggestion cards on phone POS (V1)
Liam auto-generates pairings on menu import
7 remaining tables migrated to restaurant_id
tasks.migration_notes: Run db/migrations/add-restaurant-id-remaining.sql against staging DB before pulling neil branch

milestones.title: Beta
milestones.description: Multi-restaurant live, 3rd party integrations, production hardening

tasks.title: Public /chargeback page — upload statement, see $ found
Email capture to get dispute letters
5 free AI photos on menu import
Pi poller v2 deployed + confirmed printing
Pi config in Neon DB (not json file)
Cross-reference spoken order vs entered order

milestones.title: Security Hardening
milestones.description: Production security, agent permissions, audit logging

tasks.title: Settings white crash — CategoryPrinterRouting title/name mismatch
iPad scroll broken — overflow-hidden in PwaShell
Add to Order dead — 3-layer silent failure cascade
Items invisible in OrderPanel — parseInt("main") → NaN course mismatch
Orders not showing across devices — polling local store not DB
server_name never saved on order creation
Settings UX — drill-down card pattern (no scroll fight)
Live server test at Red Bar
iPad +mods opens PhoneItemWizard full-screen (was compact bottom sheet)
tasks.notes: Edit button added to PhoneOrderReview — EditItemModal + PhoneItemWizard with real DB modifiers. Two-screen flow now consistent.
tasks.claudePrompt: Read PosModal.tsx handleEditModifiers and ItemDetailSheet usage. Explain the current +mods flow. The issue: tapping +mods on an existing order item opens ItemDetailSheet (compact) instead of PhoneItemWizard (full screen). Fix so +mods always opens PhoneItemWizard in edit mode, keeping ItemDetailSheet for new item adds only.

tasks.title: iPad T seat badge — amber contrast (was invisible zinc-on-zinc)
tasks.notes: Fixed in TabletOrderEntry.tsx (not PhoneOrderEntry). Changed bg-zinc-600 text-white → amber styling.

tasks.title: OrderPanel UX — rename +mods→Edit, remove +note button, hide elapsed timer from server view
tasks.notes: OrderPanel: +mods→Edit, removed +note (native prompt). PhoneTableListV2: elapsed timer hidden from server view, data still tracked internally.

tasks.title: Server table timer — make optional via restaurant settings (currently always-on)
tasks.notes: Timer visible to managers/KDS, optional for server view. Add toggle in /home/settings or restaurant config.

tasks.title: Default option per modifier group — schema + API + admin UI + ordering pre-selection
tasks.notes: Added default_option_id UUID FK to modifier_groups. API GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE updated. Admin UI star toggle in create/edit forms + badge in list. POS pre-selection (PhoneItemWizard + ItemDetailSheet). Public ordering derives isDefault from group-level default.

tasks.title: Inline 2-option modifier picker — pill buttons on item card, skip modal
tasks.notes: Items with only binary modifier groups (2 options, max=1, $0 deltas) render inline emerald/zinc pills on public ordering cards. Direct add-to-cart without modal. POS keeps detail sheet flow with pre-selected defaults.

tasks.title: Fix category dropdown in Assign Modifiers to Category
tasks.notes: Category dropdown showed wrong selection due to type mismatch (number vs string). Fixed by coercing cat.id to String() in both modifier and add-on section option values. Root cause was MenuManagement.tsx coercing UUID category IDs to 0.

tasks.title: Category rollups — reporting bucket column + admin UI badges + summary API
tasks.notes: Added rollup VARCHAR(50) to menu_categories. Auto-classified 43 categories. PATCH endpoint for rollup updates. Summary API at /api/pwa/reports/rollup-summary. Admin UI: colored badges, editable dropdown, summary cards at top.

tasks.title: Category cleanup — merge 10 duplicate/combo categories, deactivate 14 empties
tasks.notes: Merged all 'New Chefs Specials' combos and 'Japanese Kitchen, Japanese Kitchen.' duplicates into canonical categories. 43 items moved, 14 categories deactivated.

tasks.title: Move-item dropdown on category items + deactivate empty category prompt
tasks.notes: Move → button on each item row with category dropdown. POST /api/pwa/menu/move-item endpoint. Auto-prompt to deactivate when category reaches 0 items.

tasks.title: Categories tab — rollup-grouped accordion layout + add category + inline rename
tasks.notes: Categories organized under collapsible rollup headers. + Add Category inline form. Double-click to rename. Summary cards as anchor links.

tasks.title: Item-level rollup override — items can override category rollup for reporting
tasks.notes: rollup_override column on menu_items. PATCH endpoint. UI badge per item row. Rollup summary uses COALESCE(override, category rollup). Solves Soups & Salads having items from multiple stations.

tasks.title: Multi-select + bulk move items between categories
tasks.notes: Checkboxes on item rows, floating action bar with bulk Move To + Set Rollup. Select All + Shift+click range select.

tasks.title: CFO agent — Clerk bypass, Orion MCP Redis fix, guardrails, audit log
tasks.notes: Clerk bypass for /api/cfo, /api/liam, /api/molly. Orion route-llm graceful Redis fallback. CFO execute guardrails: block deactivating categories with items, block category-name-as-item confusion, $0 price warnings. cfo_audit_log table for undo/accountability.

tasks.title: CFO knowledge base — category architecture, three surfaces, owner misconceptions
tasks.notes: Orion knowledge/menu-categories.md + knowledge/cfo-guardrails.md. CFO system prompt updated with reporting/POS/ordering framework, safety rules, and action extraction fixes.

tasks.title: Documentation — brand guide, design doc, categories philosophy, recipe UX spec, docs index
tasks.notes: BRAND-GUIDE.md, DESIGN-DOC.md, CATEGORIES-PHILOSOPHY.md, CFO-CONFIRM-UX.md, RECIPE-UX.md, INDEX.md. Channel Views coming soon button on categories page.

tasks.title: Recipe builder — AI typical baseline, bulk ingredient table, Orion MCP integration
tasks.notes: Spec at docs/RECIPE-UX.md. Claude Code session running. Editable table with autocomplete, Generate Typical Recipe via Orion, bulk save, food cost %.

tasks.title: Pre-Shift Intel — daily specials, 86 list, push items, pairings, server upsell prompts
tasks.notes: Full pre-shift intel system: manager page at /home/specials, API stored in restaurants.settings JSONB, POS lightbulb live, Info tab on iPad wired to real data — specials, 86d, push, pairings, house note.

tasks.title: Split check — even split mode (2-6 way), seat pill amounts, paid seat state
tasks.notes: By Seat / Even Split toggle. 2-6 way grid showing per-person amount. Last person absorbs rounding. Seat pills show dollar amounts. Paid seats emerald/disabled. Progress indicator '2 of 4 paid'.
tasks.claudePrompt: PaymentModal.tsx — add Even Split mode alongside existing By Seat mode. Split toggle, even-ways grid, payAmount memo update, seat pill amounts, reset on open.

tasks.title: Split — seat assignment screen before payment
tasks.notes: Inline seat assignment on Split — seat pills per item in OrderPanel, batch save on Pay, no new screen.

tasks.title: iPhone UX — unified order screen (merge PhoneOrderEntry + PhoneOrderReview, ItemDetailSheet edit mode)
tasks.notes: Unified iPhone order screen complete. Menu/Order tabs, 1-tap edit via ItemDetailSheet, inline fire with toast, 3-step PhonePOS flow. Deleted PhoneOrderReview + PhoneSentConfirmation. ItemDetailSheet enhanced with editMode props. PosModal iPad edits now use ItemDetailSheet.
tasks.claudePrompt:
iPhone UX Refactor — Unified Order Screen

Files to modify:
1. ItemDetailSheet.tsx — add editMode, initialQuantity, initialSelectedMods, initialNotes, initialSeat props. Pre-populate in reset useEffect. Footer: Update vs Add. Skip addon fetches in edit mode.
2. PhoneOrderEntry.tsx — rewrite as unified screen. Layout: Header + Seat strip + Main content (Menu/Order tabs) + Bottom bar. Port handlers: handleFireOrder, fire-by-course, void PIN, ambient compare. Remove: handleEditItem/handleEditModalOpenMods/PhoneItemWizard chain, trayItem/trayNotes/trayModGroups state, viewMode browse/summary toggle.
3. PhonePOS.tsx — simplify Step type to table-list|guest-count|order-entry. Remove PhoneOrderReview + PhoneSentConfirmation imports. Remove goToReview, goToSent, goBackToTable, goToOrderEntryBrowse, startInBrowse, sentData.
4. PosModal.tsx — replace PhoneItemWizard portal with ItemDetailSheet in edit mode for iPad edits.

Files to DELETE after references updated:
- EditItemModal.tsx
- PhoneItemWizard.tsx
- PhoneOrderReview.tsx
- PhoneSentConfirmation.tsx

IMPORTANT: Run in /plan mode first. This is a major refactor. Get approval before implementing.

lastCommit.message:
docs: OpenClaw embedded architecture — 3-tier Maestro model for restaurants

- Tier 1 Maestro Lite (included): stateless, Orion MCP per-request
- Tier 2 Maestro Pro (/mo): shared gateway, per-restaurant workspace + memory
- Tier 3 Enterprise: dedicated OpenClaw instance
- Provisioning flows, SOUL.md template, channel bindings
- Scaling estimates and revenue projections

recentCommits.message:
docs: OpenClaw embedded architecture — 3-tier Maestro model for restaurants

- Tier 1 Maestro Lite (included): stateless, Orion MCP per-request
- Tier 2 Maestro Pro (/mo): shared gateway, per-restaurant workspace + memory
- Tier 3 Enterprise: dedicated OpenClaw instance
- Provisioning flows, SOUL.md template, channel bindings
- Scaling estimates and revenue projections

feat: image QA harness — side-by-side engine comparison (Imagen 4.0 vs Gemini 3.1 vs Fal)

- Tests 3 dishes: Pad Thai, Tonkotsu Ramen, Crispy Duck
- Generates through each engine with identical prompts
- Outputs to /tmp/image-qa/ with HTML gallery
- Gemini 3.1 uses Red Bar interior as style reference

feat: Ambient Phase 1 — auto-start recording on table open, auto-stop on fire

- New setting: ambientAutoRecord (default false)
- PhoneOrderEntry auto-starts mic when table opens (if both ambient settings enabled)
- Fire button already auto-stops + shows comparison modal
- Ref guard prevents double-start on re-renders

docs: 10 pairings + 10 upsells from menu analysis, ambient alias training spec

- Curated pairings based on cuisine, flavor profiles, dining patterns
- Upsell scripts with trigger items and revenue lift estimates
- Alias training spec: ambient corrections → menu_item_aliases table
- 20 seed aliases for Red Bar common mishears
- 15 ElevenLabs voice test scenarios
- Confidence scoring system (0.5 → 1.0)

feat: Maestro Photo Chat — interactive chat-driven image generation replacing static wizard

- State machine: lib/pwa/maestro-photo-flow.ts
- Chat UI: components/pwa/maestro/MaestroPhotoChat.tsx
- Inline uploads, style pills, image previews, revision prompt
- Replaces ImageWizardModal in ItemDetailPanel

feat: Image Wizard — step-based generation modal, Orion MCP integration, social sharing, job history

- 6 wizard components (Intent, Data, Generating, Result, MiniGallery, SocialPromo)
- 3 API routes (image-jobs/create, status, photos/send-link)
- DB migration for image_jobs + photo_links tables
- Types, lib helper, docs
- Replaces old PhotoWizard chat-bubble approach

feat: move specials to iPhone guest count screen, remove iPad specials bar

Specials now show on the PhoneGuestCount screen (right after opening a
table) where the server naturally discusses them with guests:
- New table: drink suggestions + pairings prominently shown
- Returning table: tonight's specials + push items
- House note always visible as amber banner

Removed SpecialsBar from iPad OrderPanel to save space for orders.
Removed PhoneUpsellStrip from order tab (moved to pre-order screen).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: separate course badge from table transfer — add dedicated ↗ move button

The course badge (APP/ENT) now only handles course promotion/demotion.
"Move to Table" is pulled out into its own small ↗ button next to the
course badge, making both actions discoverable and intuitive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: only show inline either/or toggles for groups with exactly 2 options

Spice level (5+ options) was incorrectly getting an inline toggle showing
just "Chef's Choice | Mild". Now only groups with exactly 2 options
(Nigiri/Sashimi, Fried/Steamed) get inline toggles. Groups with 3+
options still auto-default but show as a regular modification badge,
editable via the edit sheet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add PhoneUpsellStrip — compact specials + dynamic suggestions on iPhone order tab

Shows horizontally-scrollable pill chips at the top of the order tab:
- Daily specials (star icon, emerald)
- Push items (rocket icon, green)
- Dynamic "Add drinks?" when order has no beverages (purple)
- Wine/drink pairings matched against current order items (purple)
- House note (pin icon, amber)

Fetches from /api/pwa/specials on mount, same data source as iPad.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
